host_memory_configuration: ECC RAM (dmidecode does not report speed)
host_storage_capacity: 56 TB NVMe (8x 7 TB) + 100 GB OS disk
host_storage_type: Micron 7450 NVMe SSD (8 drives) + virtual OS disk (vda)
framework: vLLM (CentML PR32: SJF + ViT attn update) + ai-dynamo + MLPerf Inference Qwen3-VL harness
other_software_stack: Python 3.12, PyTorch 2.9.1+cu130, CUDA 13.0, cuDNN <fill>, NCCL <present>, Triton 3.5.1
hw_notes: 1 node with 8x NVIDIA H200 GPUs; all-to-all NVLink connectivity (NV18); 2-socket Sapphire Rapids host; 160 logical CPUs (80 physical cores), NUMA=2; ~1.7 TiB system RAM; 8x Micron 7450 7TB NVMe
sw_notes: MLPerf multimodal Qwen3-VL harness; vLLM via Dynamo backend; async scheduling enabled; SJF scheduling enabled when --scheduling-policy=sjf; CUDA Graph capture enabled via compilation config
